description: Revise the consent mechanism to ensure it meets GDPR requirements for granularity and provides users with clear options for opting into data tracking.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the consent settings WHEN they review their options THEN they should see clear, specific choices for opting into data tracking.

description: Conduct a full GDPR compliance audit to address legal concerns regarding data processing, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the audit is initiated WHEN the compliance team reviews the data processing practices THEN all GDPR requirements should be met before launch.

description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak and store raw events with full user identifiers for profile enrichment downstream.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is authenticated WHEN they browse content THEN their browsing history, click patterns, and scroll depth are captured in real-time.

description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions. The model should incorporate collaborative filtering and content-based approaches, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available WHEN the recommendation engine processes this data THEN it should serve personalized content suggestions with a 20% improvement in CTR within 60 days.

description: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners while ensuring compliance with privacy regulations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN anonymized user segments are ready WHEN the API is called THEN advertisers should receive cohort-level data without individual identifiers.

description: Implement a feature that allows users to opt out of tracking on a device-by-device basis, addressing enterprise user concerns about cross-device tracking.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the opt-out settings WHEN they choose to opt out THEN tracking should be disabled for that specific device.

description: Link user activity across mobile app and web browser sessions using deterministic and probabilistic matching to enable a unified user profile.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user logs in on multiple devices WHEN they interact with content THEN their activities should be linked to a single user profile.

description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays collected behavioral data, inferred interests, content categories, and engagement patterns. Include toggles to opt out of specific tracking categories.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses their dashboard WHEN they view their data THEN they should see their inferred interests and have the option to opt out of specific tracking categories.

description: Redesign the privacy settings interface to make it more user-friendly and intuitive, addressing user frustration with existing settings.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the privacy settings WHEN they navigate the interface THEN they should find it easy to understand and modify their preferences.

story_title: Set up monitoring and alerting for privacy metrics
description: Set up monitoring and alerting systems for key privacy metrics, including Privacy Opt-Out Rate and user engagement metrics, to ensure compliance and user trust.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN privacy metrics are tracked THEN alerts should trigger if the Privacy Opt-Out Rate exceeds the defined threshold.

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on the recommendation engine and privacy settings to continuously improve the user experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is active WHEN users provide feedback THEN their input should be recorded and analyzed for improvements.
